1. Complex curved movements at Z64 forming individual letters
2. Vertical/horizontal strokes creating character shapes
3. Multiple instances of "AEmbossed text" being printed

The text being printed is **"TEST"** formed by the complex print head movements I observed. The letters appear to be rendered in a specific font style using these precise coordinate patterns.
